2026-05-21T21:25:17.7287807Z Post job cleanup.
2026-05-21T21:25:17.9212123Z [command]/usr/bin/git version
2026-05-21T21:25:17.9212726Z git version 2.43.0
2026-05-21T21:25:17.9215441Z Temporarily overriding HOME='/home/runner/work/_temp/9b872b83-75c5-4061-bd14-e1b5eb6354c4' before making global git config changes
2026-05-21T21:25:17.9216948Z Adding repository directory to the temporary git global config as a safe directory
2026-05-21T21:25:17.9218291Z [command]/usr/bin/git config --global --add safe.directory /home/runner/work/GitHub-Agentic-Workflows/GitHub-Agentic-Workflows
2026-05-21T21:25:17.9219967Z Removing SSH command configuration
2026-05-21T21:25:17.9220976Z [command]/usr/bin/git config --local --name-only --get-regexp core\.sshCommand
2026-05-21T21:25:17.9223118Z [command]/usr/bin/git submodule foreach --recursive sh -c "git config --local --name-only --get-regexp 'core\.sshCommand' && git config --local --unset-all 'core.sshCommand' || :"
2026-05-21T21:25:17.9225035Z Removing HTTP extra header
2026-05-21T21:25:17.9225916Z [command]/usr/bin/git config --local --name-only --get-regexp http\.https\:\/\/github\.com\/\.extraheader
2026-05-21T21:25:17.9228468Z [command]/usr/bin/git submodule foreach --recursive sh -c "git config --local --name-only --get-regexp 'http\.https\:\/\/github\.com\/\.extraheader' && git config --local --unset-all 'http.https://github.com/.extraheader' || :"
2026-05-21T21:25:17.9230927Z Removing includeIf entries pointing to credentials config files
2026-05-21T21:25:17.9231886Z [command]/usr/bin/git config --local --name-only --get-regexp ^includeIf\.gitdir:
2026-05-21T21:25:17.9233719Z [command]/usr/bin/git submodule foreach --recursive git config --local --show-origin --name-only --get-regexp remote.origin.url
